license_default: Mixed (Apache-2.0 + MIT per skill; check individual SKILL.md)
discovery_precedence: 4. Walk up from directory → worktree looking for .claude/ and .agents/

stats.drift: registry stale by 60 skills — refresh to v2 needed

skills.name: ACT
skills.description: DEPRECATED — Use CONSTITUTIONAL_REFLEX/SKILL.md. ACT is now absorbed into the unified constitutional reflex arc. This file is retained for discovery compatibility only.

skills.name: ART
skills.description: Agentic Recursive Tooling — 4 tool states + 3 checks (POWER / TRUST / SYSTEM) loaded before every MCP call. Cross-domain hardened: Piaget, Heidegger, Dreyfus, Ashby, Wiener, Shannon, Agent Cybernetics

skills.name: CONSTITUTIONAL-REFLEX
skills.description: The complete constitutional reflex arc — ART (pre-kernel) → Kernel (F1-F13) → ACT (post-kernel execution). One skill. One spine. One file. Every agent loads this ONCE at session init.

skills.name: agentic-toolcheck
skills.description: Mandatory pre-flight checklist to ensure all tools, dependencies, and MCP servers are installed and healthy before executing complex tasks.

skills.name: agents-sdk
skills.description: Build AI agents on Cloudflare Workers using the Agents SDK. Load when creating stateful agents, durable workflows, real-time WebSocket apps, scheduled tasks, MCP servers, chat applications, voice agen

skills.name: architect
skills.description: A-R-I-F Architect role. Trigger when the task is ambiguous, strategic, architectural, or requires planning and scoping.

skills.name: arifos-agent-doctrine
skills.description: Portable agent operating doctrine — 10 invariants (route-by-data, degraded-dominance, resolve-before-act, etc.) distilled from decades-old safety engineering. The philosophy half of the two-skill arch

skills.name: arifos-evals
skills.description: Run benchmark prompts, collect pass/fail traces, latency, token cost, and false activation rates for each skill. Load when a skill changes behavior or a new version is proposed.

skills.name: arifos-governance
skills.description: Enforce Floors F1-F13, 888 HOLD logic, irreversible-action gating, evidence alignment, and veto routing. Load when performing policy mutations, data deletions, deployment risk evaluations, or verifyin

skills.name: arifos-mcp-federation

skills.name: arifos-memory

skills.name: arifos-plan-dag
skills.description: Build multi-step execution graphs, dependency-aware subtasks, checkpoints, and rollback points. Load when tasks exceed one-shot prompting and need subagent or staged execution.

skills.name: arifos-recursive-audit
skills.description: Audit all installed skills for overlap, stale docs, prompt bloat, trigger ambiguity, and broken references. Load when reviewing the skill portfolio or after modifying or adding new skills.

skills.name: arifos-untrusted-sandbox
skills.description: Mandatory bubblewrap (bwrap) supermax jail for executing any untrusted Python/JS synthesized by external AIs (Copilot, Mythos, third-party). Load when running, evaluating, or testing code from non-fed

skills.name: audit-via-tests
skills.description: Sub-skill to execute tests, capture failures, and deeply verify alignment with physics, math, and ontology.

skills.name: auditor
skills.description: A-R-I-F Auditor (Final) role. Trigger for review, verification, risk review, constitutional checks, regression checks, or release gating.

skills.name: entropy-measurement
skills.description: Sub-skill to score system structure, duplication, dead code, and boundary bleed before and after mutations.

skills.name: forge
skills.description: A-R-I-F Forge (Implementer) role. Trigger for active building, fixing, wiring, testing, scripting, or integration execution.

skills.name: frontend-design

skills.name: geox-basin-interpreter
skills.description: Subsurface reasoning for basin screening, petroleum systems analysis, trap/seal/reservoir framing, and evidence-led interpretations. Load when geology, geophysics, or petrophysics tasks appear.

skills.name: geox-binary-transport
skills.description: Covers binary brick streaming, CubeManifest, LOD pyramid, MCP resource URIs, typed array contract, GPU-ready pipeline.

skills.name: geox-claim-grammar
skills.description: The geological claim grammar — every claim must carry evidence_for, evidence_against, missing_tests, and ACRisk. No single-hypothesis geology without contradiction scan.

skills.name: geox-constitution
skills.description: Mandatory GEOX constitutional floors (F1-F13), epistemic style, 888 HOLD logic, and Anti-Hantu doctrine. Load before ANY GEOX repo action.

skills.name: geox-contradiction-engine
skills.description: Multi-hypothesis contradiction scanner. Flags conflicting evidence — low Sw but no seismic support, pressure claim without calibration, single-well sequence certainty, etc.

skills.name: geox-drift-detector
skills.description: Detects when TS frontend props drift from Pydantic models, tool docs drift from runtime signatures, or any schema diverges from canonical source. One root, one registry.

skills.name: geox-epistemic-ladder
skills.description: Teaches the GEOX epistemic ladder — OBSERVED → DERIVED → INTERPRETED_LOCAL → PROCESS_HYPOTHESIS → EARTHMODEL → DECISIONSUPPORT → HUMAN JUDGMENT. Blocks epistemic collapse.

skills.name: geox-expiry-replan
skills.description: Model-expiry, evidence versioning, replan triggers. Every output carries expires_at, evidence_version, supersedes. Stale truths must be visible.

skills.name: geox-gui-alignment
skills.description: Teaches thin GUI / thick contracts — MapLibre wiring, Three.js/R3F wiring, provenance on screen, ACRisk in props, 888 lock states. GUI never invents geological meaning.

skills.name: geox-mcp-contracts
skills.description: Owns canonical GEOX MCP contracts — registry shapes, toolcards, RenderPayload, CubeManifest, BrickResource, artifact envelope, error schemas. Forces no ad-hoc JSON shapes.

skills.name: geox-merge-gatekeeper
skills.description: No merge to main unless all gates pass — registry truth, schema parity, phantom scan, claim grammar scan, ACRisk propagation, UI provenance check, policy-as-tests.

skills.name: geox-petrophysics-bounds
skills.description: Bound transforms only — Vsh, porosity, Sw, AI, pore pressure, QC rules, LAS validation, unit handling. Permeability transforms are empirical. Pressure decisions need calibration.

skills.name: geox-redteam-hantu
skills.description: Explicitly looks for hallucinated tools, fake geology, schema drift, hidden convenience transforms, bypassed 888 logic. The anti-hantu guardian.

skills.name: geox-render-contracts
skills.description: Owns the visual render contracts — RenderPayload, modality builders, render_to_component mapping. Every visual output must conform.

skills.name: geox-sandbox-simulation
skills.description: Safe forge mode where agents can mutate mock registries, mock render payloads, mock tools, and broken fixtures without touching live organs.

skills.name: geox-test-forge
skills.description: Focused on fixture packs, golden receipts, runtime truth tests, phantom tool detection, schema snapshot tests, contract diffing. This is how opencode earns trust before touching main.

skills.name: godel-humility-lock
skills.description: Apply a self-critique and epistemic humility protocol before declaring work complete, final, SEAL-grade, or high confidence. Use for non-trivial outputs that need a final verification pass, explicit u

skills.description: Hermes RSI worker under arifOS kernel governance. Review · Synthesize · Integrate. Use for every non-trivial request to lower entropy and emit compact, structured artifacts the kernel can judge.
